# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  labels:
    app: my-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service
        image: my-service:latest
        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 80
      serviceAccountName: default
---
apiVersion: servicemanagement.networking.istio.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: my-service-exclude
spec:
  exclusionList:
  - match:
    - service:
        name: my-service
